zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia於1278年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Sancho Pérez de Ayala32歲，母親Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri28歲。他於大約1303年與Sancha Fernández Barroso在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1330年2月21日在西班牙雷吉昂 德 莫夕亞卡塔根亞享年52歲，埋葬在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦阿亞拉-艾亞拉凱可薩阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia于1278年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Sancho Pérez de Ayala32岁，母亲Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri28岁。他于大约1303年与Sancha Fernández Barroso在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1330年2月21日在西班牙雷吉昂 德 莫夕亞卡塔根亞享年52岁，埋葬在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪阿拉瓦阿亞拉-艾亞拉凱可薩阿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ayala,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Miguel, Pedro, Francisco, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.
Basque: Castilianized form of Aiala, habitational or topographic name from ai ‘slope, hillside’ + al(h)a ‘pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: mayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
English (Lancashire): variant of   Mayer   1.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Morgado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Abilio, Acacio, Armando, Mario, Edmundo, Eduardo, Miguel, Adolfo, Alejandra.  Portuguese Henrique.
Portuguese and Spanish: distinguishing name for the eldest son of a family, from Portuguese morgado ‘first-born, heir’, Late Latin maioricatus, a derivative of maior (see Mayor 2).

variants.name: Mayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Murcia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jaime, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Roberto, Alfonso, Alvaro, Consuelo, Fernando, Juan.  Portuguese Ligia.
Spanish: habitational name from the city so named in southeastern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek. See Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: López
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Lupus ‘wolf’, probably adopted as a calque of the Germanic name Wolf .

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia was born in 1278, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Sancho Pérez de Ayala, was 32 and his mother, Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, was 28. He married Sancha Fernández Barroso about 1303, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 21 February 1330, in Cartagena, Región de Murcia, Spain, at the age of 52, and was buried in Kexaa, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Basque Country, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia est né en 1278, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Sancho Pérez de Ayala, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sancha Fernández Barroso environ 1303, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 21 février 1330, à Cartagena, Región de Murcia, Espagne, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Kexaa, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia 1278 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sancho Pérez de Ayala 32 und seine Mutter Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri 28. Er hat um 1303 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Sancha Fernández Barroso geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 21. Februar 1330 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cartagena, Región de Murcia, Spanien und wurde in Kexaa, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia è nato il nel 1278 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Sancho Pérez de Ayala, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Sancha Fernández Barroso circa 1303, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 21 febbraio 1330, nel Cartagena, Región de Murcia, Spagna, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Kexaa, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murciaが1278年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Sancho Pérez de Ayalaは32歳，母Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuriは28歳であった。約1303年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでSancha Fernández Barrosoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1330年2月21日にスペインレジoン ド ムルシアカータジェナで52歳で死去し，スペインエウスカジーaラヴァエイアラ-アイアラケクサアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia(이)가 1278년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sancho Pérez de Ayala(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1303년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Sancha Fernández Barroso(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 2월 21일 스페인 레지o 데 머샤 카타겐아에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 우스카디 a라바 아야라-아이아라 케스아아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia nasceu em 1278, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Sancho Pérez de Ayala, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Sancha Fernández Barroso aproximadamente 1303, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1330, em Cartagena, Región de Murcia, Espanha, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Kexaa, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, Euskadi, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia родился в 1278 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Sancho Pérez de Ayala было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sancha Fernández Barroso около 1303 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 21 февраля 1330 г. в местности картаджена, региoн де мурся, Испания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности кексаа, аяла-еиара, aлава, эускади, Испания.

es.Quejana, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, País Vasco,: Quejana, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, País Vasco, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro López de Ayala, mayor de Murcia nació en 1278, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Sancho Pérez de Ayala, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sancha Fernández Barroso aproximadamente 1303, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1330, en Cartagena, Región de Murcia, España, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Quejana, Ayala-Aiara, Álava, País Vasco, España.
